title: Julius Berger Target Philippines Market - FinancialEDGE
description: Julius Berger Nigeria Plc, said it has declared its interest in participating in the upcoming bidding process for the Camalaniugan (Cagayan) Bridge in a consortium with Frey-Fil Corporation in the Philippines. Following its vision for diversification, the Camalaniugan project is and would be an opportunity for Julius Berger to gain experience and references in the
html:
Julius Berger Nigeria Plc, said it has declared its interest in participating in the upcoming bidding process for the Camalaniugan (Cagayan) Bridge in a consortium with Frey-Fil Corporation in the Philippines.

Following its vision for diversification, the Camalaniugan project is and would be an opportunity for Julius Berger to gain experience and references in the Philippine market. Julius Berger would provide further details to the Market as the transaction progress.
